design.users: Marketing managers, operations staff, and customer service managers at banks, securities firms, and other financial institutions. Professional, data-driven, need control.
design.aestheticDirection: Clean enterprise SaaS with premium polish — Linear meets Bloomberg Terminal. Data-dense where needed, but never cluttered.

theme.mode: light-first with full dark mode support

designPrinciples: Clarity over cleverness — every UI element earns its place
Confidence through transparency — show AI reasoning, full audit trail
Information density with breathing room — dense data, generous whitespace
Predictable patterns, purposeful motion — respect prefers-reduced-motion
Professional polish in every detail — consistent 0.625rem border-radius
